{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Starlotus madra
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Starlotus madra]] appears as a bright pink-tinged white energy.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
